kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: Opening browser 'chrome' to base url 'https://app.futureskill.co/login'.
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: AS a user, I want to login success with valid credential

kw.name: When user login to futeure skill platform with ${email} and ${valid_password}
kw.source_name: user login to futeure skill platform with ${username} and ${passwprd}

kw.name: Wait until element is ready then click element
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[text()="เข้าสู่ระบบ"]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.arg: xpath=//button[text()="เข้าสู่ระบบ"]

kw.name: Wait until element is ready then input text
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Ab.stopbus+1@gmail.com' into text field 'name=email'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Wait until element is ready then input text
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Password123!' into text field 'name=password'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Wait until element is ready then click element
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[@type="submit" and text()="เข้าสู่ระบบ"]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.arg: xpath=//button[@type="submit" and text()="เข้าสู่ระบบ"]

kw.name: Then future akill should display display validate login fail message as "อยากเก่งขึ้นจนป้าข้างบ้านสงสัย กดติดตาม FutureSkill ไว้เลย!"
kw.source_name: future akill should display display validate login fail message as ${expected_message}

kw.name: Wait until page contains element then verify text
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text '"อยากเก่งขึ้นจนป้าข้างบ้านสงสัย กดติดตาม FutureSkill ไว้เลย!"'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

test.name: As a user, I fail to login with invalid credential

kw.name: When user login to futeure skill platform with ${email} and ${invalid_password}
kw.source_name: user login to futeure skill platform with ${username} and ${passwprd}

kw.name: Wait until element is ready then click element
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[text()="เข้าสู่ระบบ"]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.arg: xpath=//button[text()="เข้าสู่ระบบ"]

Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Ab.stopbus+1@gmail.com' into text field 'name=email'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Password456!' into text field 'name=password'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait until element is ready then click element
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[@type="submit" and text()="เข้าสู่ระบบ"]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.arg: xpath=//button[@type="submit" and text()="เข้าสู่ระบบ"]

kw.name: Then future akill should display display validate login fail message as "กรอกรหัสผ่านไม่ถูกต้อง"
kw.source_name: future akill should display display validate login fail message as ${expected_message}

kw.name: Wait until page contains element then verify text
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Page should have contained text '"กรอกรหัสผ่านไม่ถูกต้อง"' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
kw.status: Page should have contained text '"กรอกรหัสผ่านไม่ถูกต้อง"' but did not.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Page should have contained text '"กรอกรหัสผ่านไม่ถูกต้อง"' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
kw.status: Page should have contained text '"กรอกรหัสผ่านไม่ถูกต้อง"' but did not.

kw.msg: Page should have contained text '"กรอกรหัสผ่านไม่ถูกต้อง"' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Page should have contained text '"กรอกรหัสผ่านไม่ถูกต้อง"' but did not.

kw.status: Page should have contained text '"กรอกรหัสผ่านไม่ถูกต้อง"' but did not.

kw.msg: Keyword 'Page Should Contain' failed after retrying 5 times. The last error was: Page should have contained text '"กรอกรหัสผ่านไม่ถูกต้อง"' but did not.
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.
kw.status: Keyword 'Page Should Contain' failed after retrying 5 times. The last error was: Page should have contained text '"กรอกรหัสผ่านไม่ถูกต้อง"' but did not.

test.status: Keyword 'Page Should Contain' failed after retrying 5 times. The last error was: Page should have contained text '"กรอกรหัสผ่านไม่ถูกต้อง"' but did not.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
